title: Ascendant
short_description: Explore a procedurally generated constellation of other people's thoughts, each taking the form of a unique star.
description: Ascendant invites you to explore a procedurally generated constellation of other people's thoughts, each taking the form of a unique star. Leave your mark on the Universe; share short words of wisdom, encouragement, dreams, memories, or moments that were special to you. Each thought you share helps make our universe feel that little bit more connected.
